phases.name: Write extraction tests for prompt files
phases.reasoning: Add extraction_tests module to src/review/prompt_loader.rs with 6 tests: file existence for all specialists, SecuritySentinel loads via PromptLoader, focus areas match hardcoded values character-for-character, mode matches default_gating(), body contains required ## sections, specialist_name matches display_name(). CRITICAL: Use loader.load() not load_specialist_prompt(), and expect specialist_name='Security Sentinel' (with space) not 'SecuritySentinel'. Tests should use CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR to locate project root. All tests will initially fail (RED) since prompt files don't exist yet.

phases.name: Create 4 extracted prompt files
phases.reasoning: Create .forge/autoresearch/prompts/ directory and write 4 files: security-sentinel.md (mode: gating), performance-oracle.md (mode: advisory), architecture-strategist.md (mode: gating), simplicity-reviewer.md (mode: advisory). Each with YAML frontmatter and markdown body matching the build_review_prompt() template structure from dispatcher.rs. Focus area strings MUST be copied character-for-character from SpecialistType::focus_areas() in specialists.rs. Verify all extraction tests pass (GREEN). Also verify T01 tests still pass and cargo check succeeds. If YAML inline comment causes parse issues, move comment to separate line or adjust frontmatter format.
